item.title: Building a Figma-Driven MCP Production Pipeline
item.description: Practitioner guide to a production Figma MCP pipeline: IDE config, tool call sequencing, and automation rules.

item.title: interface-design
item.description: Claude Code skill that enforces UI consistency — reads design principles, applies patterns, explains design choices before each component.

item.title: State of the Designer 2026: Designers Are Leaning Into the Messy Middle
item.description: 906 designers surveyed: 89% say AI makes them faster; 73% of hiring managers now require AI tool proficiency.

item.title: Design Systems Report 2026
item.description: Only 40% of teams have token pipelines; AI impact on design systems still mixed across 147 practitioners.

item.title: Agents, Meet the Figma Canvas
item.description: Agents write to canvas via MCP server. Design system quality now directly determines output quality.

item.title: Figma's MCP Just Gave AI Agents 'Write' Access — A First Look
item.description: Practical walkthrough of what Claude Code and Codex actually do with write access to the Figma canvas via MCP.

item.title: Human Strategy In An AI-Accelerated Workflow
item.description: Smashing Magazine: designers shift from output makers to directors of intent — practical strategies for AI workflows.

item.title: I Built 63 Design Skills For Claude - and They're Free
item.description: Open-source collection of 63 Claude Code design skills across 8 plugins: research, systems, UI, strategy, prototyping, and design ops.

item.title: Designing Delightful Frontends with GPT-5.4
item.description: The model understands visual hierarchy and brand positioning. Stack: React + Tailwind + Framer Motion.

item.title: claude-talk-to-figma-mcp
item.description: Community MCP server letting Claude read and modify Figma designs without a Dev Mode license; setup takes ~5 minutes.

item.title: Motion Studio — AI & Visual Animation Editor for VS Code
item.description: VS Code extension with real-time transition editing and MCP giving Cursor/Claude full Motion docs as context.

item.title: Stitch from Google Labs gets updates with Gemini 3
item.description: Stitch adds design system import, voice canvas, and multi-screen prototyping powered by Gemini 3 — still free.

item.title: Introducing 'vibe design' with Stitch (Google Labs)
item.description: Google Labs launched Stitch — an AI-native design canvas that generates high-fidelity UI from natural language prompts. Concept of 'vibe design': describe intent, get editable screens with real-time collaboration. Direct competition to Figma Make and Lovable.

item.title: State of UX 2026: Design Deeper to Differentiate
item.description: NNGroup annual analysis: UI is commoditizing via AI and design systems; research and trust become the differentiators.

item.title: figma-console-mcp
item.description: 90+ MCP tools bridging Figma and code: token/variable CRUD, agent-driven UI creation, plugin console — works on Free plans.

item.title: 5 MCP Connections Every Design System Team Needs Right Now
item.description: 5 ready-to-use MCP connections for design system teams: Figma, GitHub, PostHog, Slack, Mintlify docs.

item.title: Figma MCP server can now generate design layers from VS Code
item.description: Copilot in VS Code can now pull design context from Figma and push rendered UI back to the canvas as editable frames.

item.title: How to Supercharge your Design System with Slots
item.description: Figma Slots let you customize components without detaching — instances still inherit main component updates.

item.title: AI Tooling for Software Engineers in 2026 (Pragmatic Engineer Survey)
item.description: Engineer survey: Claude Code captured 60% of Cursor's audience in 8 months. 95% use AI tools weekly, 55% regularly use AI agents. For design engineers: Cursor wins at startups, GitHub Copilot defaults in enterprise.

item.title: UI/UX Pro Max Skill — 50K+ stars
item.description: 161 rules, 67 styles, 57 typography pairings. Works in Claude, Cursor, Copilot.
